name: aggregator preserves UTF-8 characters in rule name/description/messages through to JSON output
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json | node -e 'let s="";process.stdin.on("data",d=>s+=d);process.stdin.on("end",()=>{const r=JSON.parse(s);const rule=r.rules[0];const failures=[];if(!rule)failures.push("no rule found");if(rule&&rule.name!=="règle-spéciale")failures.push("name corrupt: "+rule.name);if(rule&&rule.description!=="日本語の説明 with émojis 🎯")failures.push("description corrupt: "+rule.description);if(rule&&rule.messages&&rule.messages.naked!=="Évitez {{thing}} — обязательно")failures.push("message corrupt: "+JSON.stringify(rule.messages));if(failures.length===0){process.stderr.write("ok\n")}else{process.stderr.write("FAIL: "+failures.join("; ")+"\n");process.exit(1)}});'
setup:
cat > tree/google/utf8.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: utf8-test
  authoritative_publisher: "Société de l'Internet"
  authoritative_url: https://example.com/utf8
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-10T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:u
rules:
  - id: utf8-rule
    name: "règle-spéciale"
    description: "日本語の説明 with émojis 🎯"
    detector: rubric/detectors/utf8.sh
    messages:
      naked: "Évitez {{thing}} — обязательно"
recommended_set: [utf8-rule]
all_set: [utf8-rule]
EOF
